subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में किस मंगलवाली पहल है।
explanation_en: Nahargarh Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Rajput clan ruled Jodhpur in the 15th century?
question_hi: 15वींचर में Jodhpur के 15वेंचर का उसका राजपुत क्लान क्या होगे?
A_en: The Rathore clan ruled Jodhpur in the 15th century.
B_en: The Rathore clan ruled Jodhpur in the 15th century.
C_en: The Rathore clan was responsible for the construction of Mehrangarh Fort.
C_hi: मेरंगारी के निर्मात में उसके राजपुत का होगे।
D_en: The Rathore clan established the Umaid Bhawan Palace.
E_en: Which queen ruled Rajasthan during the reign of Maharana Pratap?
E_hi: महाराणा प्रताप के सम्मान के दौरानी के मैना होगी?
F_en: Who was the architect behind the construction of City Palace, Udaipur?
F_hi: उदयपुर में शहर के कांकोण के सम्मान के बनन के होगी?
G_en: Which queen ruled Rajasthan during the Mughal rule?
G_hi: मुग़ल के सम्मान के दौरानी के मैना होगी?
H_en: Which king built the Aravalli Fort?
H_hi: आरावाली के बनन के कांकोण के मैना होगी?
I_en: Who was the founder of Jaisalmer Fort?
I_hi: जैसालमेर के स्वामिया के सांकोण के कोण होगी?
J_en: Which queen built the Kumbalgarh Fort?
J_hi: कुमबालगैर के कांकोण के बिकांके कोण होगी?
K_en: Which king built the Chittorgarh Fort?
